---
title: "Programming Practice: Lab 8"
execute:
  enabled: true
  echo: false
  cache: true
format:
  html:
    code-fold: false
jupyter: python3
diagram:
  cache: true
  cache-dir: ./cache
  engine:
    tikz:
      execpath: lualatex
filters:
  - diagram
---

# GitHub Actions

GitHub Actions enable Continuous Intergration/Continuous Deployment functionality (CI/CD) for our GitHub repository. 

This allows us to e.g. run a build or tests on each push to the repo.

# Exercises

0. Read the tutorial: <https://docs.github.com/en/actions/tutorials/create-an-example-workflow>.
1. Take the project from [Lab 6](lab6.qmd) and deploy it to GitHub.
2. Set up GitHub Actions that run `pytest` on every push.
